name: RealityJay: Music & visuals to feel good
summary:
Feel calm, amazed or euphoric within seconds. 
Pure hands & body-tracked interactive VR art experience where music, visuals, and your movement change the world around you—no controllers, no competition, no pressure. Just unwind, dance immersed in music! 

Touch blooming cacti, open portals, and flow with rhythm-reactive worlds. 

Hand-crafted by Miami-based artist & engineer, Agustin Di Luciano (aka Dilucious). Exhibited in contemporary art museums, and enjoyed by hundreds. 

“This feels like a dream.”...
